name: Shellex Official App Repositories
description: Public registry of official Shellex app repositories consumable by Limax.

repos.name: Limax
repos.description: Essential package manager for installing Shellex apps from repositories.

repos.name: W3
repos.description: i3-inspired tiling window manager for Shellex OS.

repos.name: Succinea
repos.description: Small status bar for Shellex version, W3 desktops, memory, storage and running apps.

repos.name: Indexella
repos.description: Keyboard app finder for installed Shellex apps.

repos.name: Filella
repos.description: Vault file manager for browsing, creating and editing files.

repos.name: Punctum
repos.description: Keyboard-friendly text editor for vault files.

repos.name: History
repos.description: Shell history viewer for recent commands and output.
